title: Westside Capital India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Westside Capital India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Westside Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Westside Capital India:
Westside Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Westside Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
